title: missing table name with invalid column in join using (and problems after resolving it)
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_c (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, value TEXT NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE test_d (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, value REAL DEFAULT 0.0);
SELECT * FROM test_c CROSS JOIN test_d WHERE test_c.id IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: JOIN using an invalid column name
